extraction.one_line_summary: VAN DER POEL Mathieu attacked inside 4km multiple times, escaped with BENOOT Tiesj after using teammates' earlier acceleration, held sprint with 250m to go
tactical_patterns: Ineos used TURNER/PIDCOCK to create 5-rider split on Oude Kwaremont cobbles, positioning before traditional finale climbs crucial
CAMPENAERTS chipped tooth using 62-tooth chainring on descent attacks, showing extreme gearing gambles pay off on technical downhills
VAN DER POEL attacked 3+ times inside 4km after teammates worked earlier, repeated accelerations broke chasers' cooperation
POGACAR bridged 40-second gaps twice despite cobble inexperience, pure power compensates for technical deficits more than expected

rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: closed multiple 40-second gaps on debut cobbled race, shows Classics contention viable without prior experience
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Tom: positive: bridged to CAMPENAERTS attack then followed VAN DER POEL's repeated accelerations for podium, elite positioning instincts
rider_signals.CAMPENAERTS Victor: positive: solo descent attack with 62-tooth chainring created first meaningful gap, high-risk equipment choices justify selection
rider_signals.BENOOT Tiesj: positive: matched VAN DER POEL's final attacks and nearly won sprint, Jumbo tactics of waiting for teammate counterproductive
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: negative: chased on Kattenberg but couldn't sustain effort to bridge, age limiting explosive efforts on key climbs
rider_signals.NAESEN Oliver: negative: crashed hard mid-race eliminating contender, touch-of-wheels crashes remain tactical liability in cobbled races
